content: We can frame the neural architecture of an episodic planning agent as a dynamic, self-curating transformer attention mask that only activates around high-curiosity episodic traces selected via active curiosity-driven learning. This design lets the agent prioritize replaying high-information, exploratory past episodes over mundane, low-reward experiences during long-horizon planning.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
